title: Browse the home page storefront
description: This verifies that a visitor can land on the home page and see the main curated shopping content from top to bottom.

steps.description: Verify the hero section is displayed
Verify curated shopping sections are displayed
Verify the footer content is displayed

title: Browse the home storefront and open a featured product
description: This verifies that a shopper can evaluate the home page sections and open a featured product from the storefront.
category: Product detail and Amazon affiliate link

steps.description: Scroll through the home page sections
Click a featured product from the home page
Verify the product detail view is displayed
Verify the product information is displayed

title: Open a featured product from the home page
description: This verifies that a visitor can move from the home page into a featured product detail view and see the product information needed to evaluate it.

steps.description: Click a featured product from the curated home content
Verify the product detail view is displayed

title: Open the Shop view and return home
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the shop experience from the home page and return to the main landing view afterward.

Verify the affiliate call to action is available

title: Review the full product details before buying

Verify the product detail content is complete

title: Browse products within a shop category
description: This verifies that a shopper can open the shop view, choose a category, and see the matching product list.
